method: AMK int8 W8A16 (self-tuned qc/N_tile/threads, N_tile scales up with width) vs CUDA-graphed cuBLAS bf16; kernel-only vm.relaunch vs g.replay, 1-token decode, paired-interleaved, correctness-gated argmax-exact; crossing iff best p10>1.0. Random-init weights of real Llama shapes — tests whether AMK's int8 byte-read advantage overcomes the per-tile cross-SM sync once GEMVs amortize it.
